what_it_does: A channel-memory attachment metadata file that records a typed link between an attachment identifier and a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: target is a board:// URI pointing to item-9c87938c
No body content beyond the frontmatter
standouts: target uses a board://item-9c87938c URI scheme
attachment_type board_items indicates a board-item linkage
File is purely metadata with no attached payload
conventions: board:// URI scheme for cross-referencing board items
concerns: No payload or content beyond the metadata link
Target board item is not described or inlined
No author or provenance source field
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that ties att-f16b62b1 to board item item-9c87938c in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What does board item item-9c87938c represent?

purpose_vs_actual: The implicit purpose is to record an attachment association; the actual content is only a minimal typed link with no attached payload.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to preserve a timestamped record that a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel has an associated attachment identifier.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme in the target field and an otherwise empty body.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between an attachment identifier and a board item target in the channel memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file that records a board_items link from att-f16b62b1 to board://item-9c87938c in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To preserve a timestamped provenance record associating an attachment identifier with a specific board item in a development channel.
